waypoints.name: Sankri Village
waypoints.description: Road head and acclimatisation stop. Last ATM and phone signal.

waypoints.name: Taluka
waypoints.description: Trail junction — bridge crossing over Supin River.

waypoints.name: Osla Village
waypoints.description: Last permanent habitation. Resupply opportunity. Temple of Someshwar.

waypoints.name: Base Camp
waypoints.description: Main base camp on open meadow. Water from glacial stream. Full rest day recommended.

waypoints.name: Advanced Base Camp
waypoints.description: Snow line begins. Crampons may be needed. Fixed tents.

waypoints.name: High Camp 1
waypoints.description: Exposed ridge camp. Crampons required. Crevasse hazard on approach.

waypoints.name: Kalanag Summit
waypoints.description: Broad icy plateau. 360° views: Swargarohini, Bandarpunch, Gangotri range.
